description: Shared fixture catalogue for integration and end-to-end test specifications.

input_sample_bib.purpose: Canonical sample BibTeX input for functional test scenarios.

input_iclr2025_1k_bib.purpose: Large real-world BibTeX input for representative high-volume scenarios.

template_entry_md.purpose: Markdown output template for per-entry rendering scenarios.

template_entry_single_json.purpose: Single-output template for rendering all selected entries into one file.

inline_author_formats.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source that mixes Last, First and First Last author formats.

inline_non_standard_fields.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source that includes non-standard fields such as abstract and keywords.

inline_month_and_day_formats.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source covering named months, numeric months and single-digit day values.

inline_keywords_mixed_punctuation.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source with keywords containing spaces and punctuation that must be slugified.

inline_raw_bibtex_entry.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source used to verify raw_bibtex exposure in templates.

inline_multiple_entries.purpose: Minimal BibTeX source containing multiple entries for entries-collection scenarios.

template_single_entries.purpose: Minimal template that iterates over the entries collection in single-output mode.

invalid_template_comment_syntax.purpose: Template content that should fail Tera parsing and expose the underlying error.

malformed_bibtex_input.purpose: Invalid BibTeX content used to verify immediate parse failure paths.

missing_input_path.purpose: Reference to a non-existent input path used for file-not-found error scenarios.

missing_template_path.purpose: Reference to a non-existent template path used for file-not-found error scenarios.

preexisting_output_file.purpose: Pre-created output artefact used to verify overwrite and skip behaviour.

expected_file_names.purpose: Expected file names for supported naming strategies for the selected input fixture set.

expected_single_mode_name.purpose: Expected single-output file name derived from the input and template file stems.

selected_entry_keys.purpose: Representative include and exclude key selections used for info command scenarios.

representative_random_subset_rule.purpose: Documented rule for choosing a repeatable representative subset when exhaustive output checking is unnecessary.
